clips.title: The Arcade
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A retro arcade at night, banks of glowing cabinets, haze in the air. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of electric cyan and magenta light, colored glow spilling across every surface and the person's face. A person in a sleek jacket stands among the machines, lit entirely by the neon. Intense cyan-magenta neon wash, volumetric haze, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Rain Alley
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A rain-soaked back alley at night, glowing signage overhead, wet pavement. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of pink and blue light, colored reflections shimmering on the wet ground and the person. A person in a hooded techwear jacket stands under the signs, washed in neon. Intense pink-blue neon wash, wet reflections, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Booth
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A nightclub DJ booth, glowing decks and strip lights. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of purple and teal light, the color pulsing across the person and equipment. A person in a stylish outfit stands at the booth, entirely lit by the neon glow. Intense purple-teal neon wash, haze, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Diner Glow
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A late-night diner, a big neon sign in the window. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of red and blue light through the glass, the color washing over the person and booth. A person in a casual jacket sits in the booth, lit by the neon. Intense red-blue neon wash, soft haze, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Underpass
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A concrete underpass at night, neon tube lights lining the walls. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of green and magenta light, glowing across the tunnel and the person. A person in a bomber jacket stands in the passage, washed entirely in neon. Intense green-magenta neon wash, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Sign Shop
clips.prompt: Cyberpunk style, present day. A neon-sign workshop at night, dozens of glowing tubes on the walls. The scene is bathed in a saturated neon wash of multicolored light, vivid color spilling across the person and room. A person in a work shirt stands among the signs, lit entirely by the neon. Intense multicolor neon wash, glowing haze, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
